purpose: Track static-only changes that still require RCH-only cargo proof after the bd-716tv worker-admissibility blocker is resolved.

claim_policy.reason: This ledger is a replay plan, not remote cargo evidence.

entries.title: tests(meta): pin no cli_contract.v1.json manifest contains Windows backslash path
remote_validation_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test cli_contract_manifest_no_windows_backslash_test -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --test cli_contract_manifest_no_windows_backslash_test
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test cli_contract_manifest_no_windows_backslash_test -- -D warnings

entries.title: tests(meta): pin no paired *_cli_contract_test.rs declares a trait
remote_validation_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test cli_contract_paired_gate_no_trait_decl_test -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --test cli_contract_paired_gate_no_trait_decl_test
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test cli_contract_paired_gate_no_trait_decl_test -- -D warnings

entries.title: tests(meta): pin no paired *_cli_contract_test.rs declares const fn

static_checks.command: awk non-comment scan for const-fn token over crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/*_cli_contract_test.rs

remote_validation_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test cli_contract_paired_gate_no_const_fn_test -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --test cli_contract_paired_gate_no_const_fn_test
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test cli_contract_paired_gate_no_const_fn_test -- -D warnings

entries.title: tests(meta): pin no paired *_cli_contract_test.rs uses raw file descriptor traits

static_checks.command: awk non-comment scan for AsRawFd/IntoRawFd/FromRawFd over crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/*_cli_contract_test.rs

remote_validation_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test cli_contract_paired_gate_no_raw_fd_traits_test -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --test cli_contract_paired_gate_no_raw_fd_traits_test
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test cli_contract_paired_gate_no_raw_fd_traits_test -- -D warnings
